task_completion.description: Create a new vehicle profile named 'Delivery Van' with vehicle type 'Van'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a vehicle profile creation or edit screen with the name 'Delivery Van' entered and the vehicle type set to 'Van' (often indicated by a van icon or text selection).

task_completion.description: Set fuel type to 'Diesel', production year to 2022, and emission category to Euro6
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the vehicle profile details showing 'Diesel' selected for fuel, '2022' entered for production year, and 'Euro 6' (or EURO6) selected for emission category.

task_completion.description: Set 'Delivery Van' as the active vehicle profile
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the vehicle profiles list showing 'Delivery Van' as the currently selected or active profile (e.g., indicated by a checkmark, highlight, or 'active' label).

task_completion.description: Configure the app to use 'Shortest route' for route computation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Route Planning or Route Computing settings menu showing 'Shortest' selected as the preferred routing method.

task_completion.description: Allow toll roads in route planning
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the route settings or road types menu showing toll roads are allowed (e.g., 'Avoid toll roads' toggle is turned OFF, or 'Toll roads' is set to 'Use').
Screenshot of the navigation or routing settings showing the 'Arrive in direction' (or similar pull-up side) feature toggled ON.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the app's menus and settings screens rather than using terminal commands or editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a GPS navigation app (Sygic) with standard Android/iOS UI elements, not a text editor, notes app, or web browser displaying the task.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply type the task description into a search bar or text field
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs are placed in their appropriate specific fields (e.g., 'Delivery Van' in the name field, '2022' in the year field) rather than pasting the whole prompt into a single text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Sygic GPS Navigation supports vehicle profiles with configurable attributes. Verify the following exact settings: Vehicle Name = 'Delivery Van', Vehicle Type = 'VAN', Fuel Type = 'DIESEL', Production Year = 2022, Emission Category = 'EURO6' (or Euro 6). Route computation must be set to 'Shortest' (not fastest or economic). Toll roads must be allowed ('Avoid toll roads' = false/off). 'Arrive in direction' must be enabled (true/on).
